evals.name: izakaya-full-ingest
evals.prompt:
We're onboarding a new live restaurant for OmiseAI — Torihei, an izakaya in Osaka. The owner sent over their menu (pasted below). Ingest it into our NFG data so the concierge can answer diner questions about it.

--- MENU (as sent by owner) ---
【一品】
牛すじ煥込み ¥680
鶏の唐揚げ ¥580
だし巻き卵 ¥480
ポテトサラダ ¥380
本日の刺身盛り合わせ ¥1200
【酒】
黒龍 純米吟醸 (グラス) ¥900
--- END MENU ---

evals.name: allergy-trap-verify
evals.prompt:
Verify the allergens for this lunch menu before we turn on the OmiseAI concierge for this store. A diner with allergies will be relying on the answers.

--- LUNCH MENU ---
ロースかつ定食 ¥1000
エビフライ ¥1200
杏仁豆腐 ¥350
コーヒーゼリー ¥300
--- END ---

evals.name: gap-finding-soba
evals.prompt:
Here's a menu from a soba shop we're signing up. What do we need to ask the owner about these dishes before we can safely let the concierge answer diner questions about them?

--- MENU ---
ざるそば ¥700
天ぷらそば ¥1100
カレーうどん ¥950
そばがき ¥600
--- END ---
